gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/200)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كُفُّوا أَلْسِنَتَكُمْ وَ الْزَمُوا بُيُوتَكُمْ فَإِنَّهُ لَا يُصِيبُكُمْ أَمْرٌ تَخُصُّونَ بِهِ أَبَداً وَ لَا تَزَالُ الزَّيْدِيَّةُ لَكُمْ وِقَاءً أَبَداً .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from usman Bin Isa, from the one who informed him who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Restrain your tongues and bind (yourselves) to your houses, so no matter would hit you specialising you with it, ever, nor would the Zaidites cease to be shielding you, ever!’
en.sarwar: 13. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from those he has narrated from and who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Control your tongues and stay home, no one will ever disturb you in particular. Zaydi people are still a protection for you and they will always be as such.’”
